books.subtitle: A Gentle Approach to Financial Anxiety That Meets You Where You Are
books.desc: You're sure that if they really saw you, it would be over. stop panicking about money and think clearly.
books.long_desc:
You're sure that if they really saw you, it would be over.

This book is for working parent of young kidss who the numbers spiral and I can't make it stop. It doesn't promise to make the feeling stop. It names what's happening in language you can use the next time it happens.

Chapter by chapter, you'll work with the exposure-fear that keeps you bracing to be found out, and why it runs so deep. Not through exposure or worksheets or morning routines — through recognition, descent, and integration. The practice the book asks for can happen on a subway, between meetings, or at 3am.

You'll walk away knowing what your body is doing and why it makes sense. Not fixed. Not healed in any final sense. But no longer alone with the pattern.

Book 3 of the Solar Return financial anxiety series.
